zh.La Roche-Bernard, 56195, Morbihan, Breta: 法國布列塔尼莫比韓拉 洛-波納德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mahaud de MONFORT於大約1214年出生在法國布列塔尼時，她的父親Guillaume Gaël de Montfort35歲，母親Nina de Rostrenen63歲。她與Unknown結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1279年享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mahaud de MONFORT于大约1214年出生在法国布列塔尼时，她的父亲Guillaume Gaël de Montfort35岁，母亲Nina de Rostrenen63岁。她与Unknown结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1279年享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: MONFORT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Montfort
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Mont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Juan, Cristina, Domingo, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Mariano, Ramon, Trinidad.
Catalan and French: topographic name for a mountain dweller, from Catalan and (Old) French mont ‘mountain’ (from Latin mons, genitive montis). Compare French Demont and Dumont .

nameMeanings.name: Mahaud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Mahaud de MONFORT was born about 1214, in Brittany, France, her father, Guillaume Gaël de Montfort, was 35 and her mother, Nina de Rostrenen, was 63. She married Unknown. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1279, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mahaud de MONFORT est née environ 1214, à Bretagne, France, son père, Guillaume Gaël de Montfort, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Nina de Rostrenen, avait 63 ans. Elle a épousé Unknown. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1279, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mahaud de MONFORT um 1214 in Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume Gaël de Montfort 35 und ihre Mutter Nina de Rostrenen 63. Sie hat Unknown geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1279 im Alter von 67 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mahaud de MONFORT è nata il circa 1214 nel Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume Gaël de Montfort, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Nina de Rostrenen, aveva 63 anni. Lei sposato Unknown. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1279, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.La Roche-Bernard,56195,Morbihan,Bretagne: フランスブレタグンモービハンラ ロチェ-バーナルド
ja.La Roche-Bernard, 56195, Morbihan, Breta: フランスブレタグンモービハンラ ロチェ-バーナルド
ja.lifeSummary: Mahaud de MONFORTが約1214年にフランスブレタグンで生まれた時，父Guillaume Gaël de Montfortは35歳，母Nina de Rostrenenは63歳であった。Unknownと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1279年に67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mahaud de MONFORT(이)가 대략 1214년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume Gaël de Montfort(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nina de Rostrenen(은)는 63세였다. 그녀는 Unknown(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1279년 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Abt 1214–about 1279: tany ho any amin'ny 1214–tany ho any amin'ny 1279

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mahaud de MONFORT nasceu aproximadamente 1214, em Bretagne, França, seu pai, Guillaume Gaël de Montfort, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Nina de Rostrenen, tinha 63 anos. Ela casou-se com Unknown. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1279, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mahaud de MONFORT родилась около 1214 г. в местности бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume Gaël de Montfort было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Nina de Rostrenen, 63. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Unknown. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1279 г. в возрасте 67 лет.

sm.Abt 1214–about 1279: e tusa o le 1214–e tusa o le 1279

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mahaud de MONFORT nació aproximadamente 1214, en Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Guillaume Gaël de Montfort, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Nina de Rostrenen, tenía 63 años. Se casó con Unknown. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1279, a la edad de 67 años.
